loginSubtitle: Enter your email below to log in.
onboardingSubtitle: Enter your information to create an account.
agreeToTerms: I agree to the terms of service and privacy policy
forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
changeExpiredSubtitle: For security, passwords must be rotated regularly. Enter your current password and choose a new one.
twoFactorSetupSubtitle: Scan the QR code with an authenticator app, then enter the code it displays.
twoFactorVerifySubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
twoFactorRecoverySubtitle: Enter one of the recovery codes you saved when you enabled 2FA.
saveRecoveryCodesSubtitle: These codes are your backup if you lose access to your authenticator. Each code can only be used once.
acceptInviteJoinSubtitle: You've been invited to collaborate with {{tenant}}.
acceptInviteSignupSubtitle: Set up your account to join {{tenant}}.
